_comment: Three sequential POST calls to /models/{model_id}/approve. All three stages are required before the model reaches APPROVED state.

step_1_validation.notes: All metrics exceed thresholds. Holdout evaluation confirmed.

step_2_risk_review.notes: Fairness report reviewed. False-positive disparity within policy limits. Approved.

step_3_production_approval.notes: Platform capacity confirmed. Shadow deployment test passed. Approved for production.
